posts.author: ha_the_meow
posts.community: Modison LTD - Can the switchgear company switch fortunes?
posts.text: AGM 2026 notes (ppt pdf attached) The company is very unprofessional in terms of investor relationship and very poor communication with its shareholders. The CEO couldn’t answer basic questions, have very short term memory. Can’t remember more than 2 questions at a time and was only answering last question if someone asked multiple questions. There is increase in raw material prices specifically powdered tungston (HV contacts) and silver. Close tie with GE, Siemens and ABB both domestically and internationally. Increased volume growth for both high and low voltage contacts. Export to increase…
